reason: Full audit pass — 0 confirmed bugs. All authentication, payload validation, signal engine, freshness, and parity checks verified correct. System is in stable, hardened state as of Phase 4 code completion (2026-05-25).
confirmed_stable_components: EA auth: permission_ea_market_stream → permission_ea_bridge — all 4 error cases correct
EA payload validation: symbol, timeframe, quote_time, bid/ask, OHLC, tick_volume, staleness rejection
Stale data rejection: age > 300s → 422, unparseable → 422, warning at 120-300s
Candle validation: epoch guard (pre-2000 rejection), OHLC ordering check, stream-timestamp staleness
Signal engine guard: rejects non-mt5, non-live, age > staleThresholdSec
age_sec derivation: from stored updated_at (sourced from quote_time) — not from fetch time
FreshnessBadge: uses backend state prop, never derives from local time
FibEngine.mqh: MAX_SESSIONS enum change (commit 6b4c544) is non-functional
Symbol normalization: map_symbol_aliases handles broker variants across PHP and MQL5
NAS100/US30 equity session handling: is_equity_index_off_session correct (EDT/EST DST-aware)
XAUUSD/GOLD alias: handled in both PHP map_symbol_aliases and MQL5 SymbolNormalizer
